sourceMovie.title: Me Before You
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Me Before You works as a drama movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The drama and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Notebook
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Me Before You clicked for you, The Notebook (2004) is a strong next stop: both trade in drama and romance, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Me Before You?
faq.answer: Try The Notebook, The Fault in Our Stars, Lost in Translation—each shares DNA with Me Before You while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Me Before You?
faq.answer: Me Before You (2016) is best described as Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Me Before You worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.9/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this drama lane.
